description: Compounding probes that require the agent to synthesize information from multiple prior sessions. Each probe depends on facts from 2-4 prior sessions. Correct answers require ALL dependencies to be remembered. A single missing fact causes failure, making the aging curve monotonically worse as more facts are lost.

probes.text: I want to go back to my favorite restaurant for dinner this week. Can you recommend what I should order there, given all my dietary needs?
probes.dependency_description: Must remember: (1) favorite restaurant is Olive Garden [F0], (2) celiac diagnosis requires strict gluten-free [F3]
probes.gold_answer: Should mention Olive Garden (F0) AND flag gluten/celiac concerns (F3) — need to check gluten-free options at Olive Garden.

probes.text: I'm thinking about my monthly budget. How much have I spent on big purchases recently, and am I still within my shopping limits?
probes.dependency_description: Must remember: (1) Nordstrom jacket $280 [F1], (2) standing desk $320 [F5], plus the $500/month shopping limit [C2]
probes.gold_answer: Should recall both purchases ($280 jacket + $320 desk = $600) and flag that this exceeds the $500/month shopping budget.

probes.text: Plan a dinner celebration for my salary raise. Where should we go, what can I eat, and what's my new budget limit?
probes.dependency_description: Must remember: (1) favorite restaurant Olive Garden [F0], (2) celiac/gluten-free [F3], (3) new dining budget $250 [F6]
probes.gold_answer: Should suggest Olive Garden (or ask about it), mention gluten-free requirements, and reference the new $250 dining budget.

probes.text: I want to adjust my exercise schedule. Remind me what class I'm currently doing, when it is, and suggest adding a second weekly session that fits my schedule rules.
probes.dependency_description: Must remember: (1) spin class at 7:45 AM Wednesdays at CycleFit [F4], (2) exercise must be before 8 AM [C7]
probes.gold_answer: Should recall the CycleFit spin class at 7:45 AM on Wednesdays and suggest another slot before 8 AM.

probes.text: I need to plan my friend Alex's thank-you gift for the birthday dinner. What happened at that dinner, and find a gift that fits within my budget rules.
probes.dependency_description: Must remember: (1) Alex's birthday at Thai restaurant, spent $75 [F8], (2) shopping budget $500/month, no single item over $300 without confirmation [C2]
probes.gold_answer: Should recall Alex's birthday dinner at the Thai restaurant and recommend a gift within budget constraints (under $300 or ask for confirmation).

probes.text: Give me a summary of all my food-related subscriptions and dining preferences. What services am I using, what are my dietary restrictions, and what's my dining budget?
probes.dependency_description: Must remember: (1) celiac diagnosis [F3], (2) dining budget $250 [F6], (3) GreenChef subscription $12.99 [F9]
probes.gold_answer: Should mention celiac/gluten-free restriction, $250 dining budget, and GreenChef meal prep subscription at $12.99/month.
